articles.description: Key Points:Tom Lee, chairman of BitMine’s board, believes Ethereum has a greater than 50% probability of overtaking Bitcoin by market capitalization. Lee made the comments in an interview on August 23, citing Ethereum’s expanding role in decentralized finance (DeFi) and Web3.
